notes: Heavy-armor sustainment specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Salvage Works builds Juggernaut, Repair Truck, and Granite Crumbler; Granite Crumbler was previously Fort Irongrad-exclusive and is now shared, same pattern as Juggernaut/Rocket Tank across Tank Plant/Frostworks. Sniper Turret is its specialty defense — a Turret variant scaled up from the Sniper troop (highest damage/range, slowest attack speed of any Turret variant, damageTypes: [Piercing] to bypass armor — see data/buildings/sniper_turret.json), the counter-side of the base's heavy-armor theme. initialGarrison omits Repair Truck (damage 0, empty canTarget — a pure support unit, not a combatant, same reasoning as excluding Engineer/Disruptor/Glider elsewhere).
